proof_trace: Double-free occurs when UVector constructor fails: deleteOlsonToMetaMappingEntry(entry) at line 684 calls uprv_free(entry), then line 685 calls uprv_free(entry) again on the same pointer.
attack_scenario: Trigger memory allocation failure during UVector construction to cause double-free, leading to heap corruption and potential arbitrary code execution.

proof_trace: Race condition between cleanup and access. SharedObject::clearPtr() in cleanup sets rootSingleton=NULL and calls removeRef(), while concurrent getRoot() can dereference rootSingleton->tailoring without synchronization protection.
attack_scenario: During library shutdown, cleanup thread calls uprv_collation_root_cleanup() while another thread calls getRoot(), causing null pointer dereference or use-after-free.
reason: uprv_collation_root_cleanupでinitOnce.reset()前にclearPtr(rootSingleton)を呼ぶため、並行getRoot()がfreed rootSingleton->tailoringを参照するUAF。PR #3921提出済み(OPEN)。@markusicu がJira承認済み。PRテンプレート復元+ユニットテスト追加を要求され対応済み(Push完了)。メンテナの再確認待ち。

proof_trace: Double-free vulnerability: line 1557 calls uprv_free(p) where p aliases regions pointer, causing regions to be freed twice (once in loop iteration when p==regions, again at line 1559). Should be uprv_free(*p) to free individual strings.
attack_scenario: Malformed resource bundle data triggers region processing error, executing cleanup code path that double-frees regions array, potentially enabling code execution.

proof_trace: Cleanup function deletes pointers but doesn't nullify them (lines 328, 333, 337, 341). If called multiple times, subsequent calls check non-null dangling pointers and attempt double-delete, causing undefined behavior. Classic use-after-free via double-delete pattern.
attack_scenario: Attacker triggers multiple cleanup calls through library shutdown/restart sequences or error conditions, causing double-delete of availableRegions/hashtables leading to heap corruption and potential RCE.
reason: Double-delete — cleanupRegionData()でdelete/uhash_close後にポインタをNULL化しないため、u_cleanup()再呼び出しでdouble-delete発生。PR #3922提出済み(OPEN)。hirorogo がJiraチケットステータス変更を依頼。メンテナ(@markusicu)返信待ち。PRテンプレート復元+ユニットテスト追加は対応済み(Push完了)。Jira承認待ち。

proof_trace: Logic error in node navigation when both HAS_BEFORE2 and HAS_BEFORE3 flags are set. The nodeHasBefore3 condition incorrectly uses the original node instead of the updated node from nodeHasBefore2 branch, causing incorrect index calculation that could point to freed memory.
attack_scenario: Supply collation rule input that creates nodes with both HAS_BEFORE2 and HAS_BEFORE3 flags set, triggering incorrect node navigation that computes an index pointing to deallocated memory, leading to use-after-free when the index is subsequently used.
reason: Logic error misclassified as UAF — wrong bug type
